stops.reasoning: Analytical transform (roman_numeral_letter_count) on stop 14 value
stops.reason_code:
def to_roman(n):
    n = abs(int(n))
    vals = [(1000,'M'),(900,'CM'),(500,'D'),(400,'CD'),(100,'C'),
            (90,'XC'),(50,'L'),(40,'XL'),(10,'X'),(9,'IX'),(5,'V'),(4,'IV'),(1,'I')]
    r = ''
    for v, s in vals:
        while n >= v:
            r += s; n -= v
    return r
result = len(to_roman(72))
print(result)

bridge.expression_code:
def digital_root(n):
    n = abs(int(n))
    return n if n == 0 else ((n - 1) % 9) + 1
result = digital_root(99 + 20 + 112)
print(result)

stops.reasoning: Compute stop: digital_root(99 + 20 + 112) = 6
